antipattern.symptom: Retros vent emotions; never produce actions; same problems recur.
antipattern.fix: Schema requires ≥1 action item with owner + due-date per retro.

antipattern.symptom: Standup is status report to manager; engineers tune out.
antipattern.fix: Published purpose displayed at standup start.

antipattern.symptom: Sprint planning has 14 people; decisions watered down.
antipattern.fix: Schema requires attendees_mandatory; optional invites separated.

antipattern.symptom: Team spends 15% of sprint in ceremonies; velocity declines.
antipattern.fix: overhead_pct cap 0.10 enforced by validator; trigger retune action.
